IO.AISstream.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for AISStream CloudEvents on the `aisstream` topic keyed by `{mmsi}`.

IO.AISstream.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for AISStream CloudEvents using the topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

IO.AISstream.PositionReport.name: PositionReport
IO.AISstream.PositionReport.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

IO.AISstream.ShipStaticData.name: ShipStaticData
IO.AISstream.ShipStaticData.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

IO.AISstream.StandardClassBPositionRepor.name: StandardClassBPositionReport
IO.AISstream.StandardClassBPositionRepor.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

IO.AISstream.ExtendedClassBPositionRepor.name: ExtendedClassBPositionReport

IO.AISstream.StaticDataReport.name: StaticDataReport

IO.AISstream.BaseStationReport.name: BaseStationReport
IO.AISstream.BaseStationReport.description: A reference record from AISStream public AIS firehose for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

IO.AISstream.SafetyBroadcastMessage.name: SafetyBroadcastMessage
IO.AISstream.SafetyBroadcastMessage.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

IO.AISstream.LongRangeAisBroadcastMessag.name: LongRangeAisBroadcastMessage
IO.AISstream.LongRangeAisBroadcastMessag.description: A vehicle or vessel update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It reports the latest position, movement, identity, or voyage information available from the upstream feed.

IO.AISstream.description: Events from AISStream covering AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

IO.AISstream.mqtt.PositionReport.name: PositionReport
IO.AISstream.mqtt.PositionReport.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

IO.AISstream.mqtt.ShipStatic.name: ShipStatic

IO.AISstream.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the AISStream events. It carries the same transport semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

schema.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

schema.name: PositionReport
schema.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI (Maritime Mobile Service Identity) as a 9-digit ASCII string. Mirrors UserID from the upstream AIS payload, padded to 9 digits with leading zeros. Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country (e.g. inland-water identifiers, auxiliary craft, base stations) or for MMSIs shorter than 9 digits.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket. For static reports this is derived directly from the AIS Type-5/24 ShipType field via the standard ITU-R M.1371 vocabulary (e.g. 'cargo', 'tanker', 'passenger', 'fishing', 'tug', 'pleasure-craft'). For position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI; if no static report has been observed for the MMSI yet, the value is 'unknown'.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (Latitude, Longitude) using the standard base32 geohash alphabet. Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position (Type 5/24/21 base reports) this is filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000' if no position has been seen.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

latitude.description: Reported latitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Reported longitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

true_heading.description: True heading in degrees (0..359, 511 = not available).

rate_of_turn.description: Rate of turn in AIS-encoded units.

position_accuracy.description: True if the reported position is high accuracy (DGPS).

message_id.description: Original ITU-R M.1371 message ID (1, 2, 3, 4, 9, 18, 19, or 27).

schema.name: ShipStatic
schema.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI (Maritime Mobile Service Identity) as a 9-digit ASCII string. Mirrors UserID from the upstream AIS payload, padded to 9 digits with leading zeros. Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country (e.g. inland-water identifiers, auxiliary craft, base stations) or for MMSIs shorter than 9 digits.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket. For static reports this is derived directly from the AIS Type-5/24 ShipType field via the standard ITU-R M.1371 vocabulary (e.g. 'cargo', 'tanker', 'passenger', 'fishing', 'tug', 'pleasure-craft'). For position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI; if no static report has been observed for the MMSI yet, the value is 'unknown'.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (Latitude, Longitude) using the standard base32 geohash alphabet. Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position (Type 5/24/21 base reports) this is filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000' if no position has been seen.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

name.description: Vessel name as broadcast (max 20 chars, trimmed of AIS '@' padding).

call_sign.description: Radio call sign as broadcast (max 7 chars).

ship_type_code.description: Raw ITU-R M.1371 ship type code (0..99).

destination.description: Voyage destination string (max 20 chars). Empty for Type 24.

eta.description: Voyage ETA as ISO-8601 string, derived from AIS month/day/hour/minute. Empty if absent.

draught.description: Maximum present static draught in metres. 0.0 if not provided.

dim_to_bow.description: Distance from reference point to bow in metres.

dim_to_stern.description: Distance from reference point to stern in metres.

dim_to_port.description: Distance from reference point to port side in metres.

dim_to_starboard.description: Distance from reference point to starboard side in metres.

message_id.description: Original ITU-R M.1371 message ID (5 or 24).

schema.name: AidToNavigation
schema.description: A transport update from AISStream public AIS firehose. It carries vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI (Maritime Mobile Service Identity) as a 9-digit ASCII string. Mirrors UserID from the upstream AIS payload, padded to 9 digits with leading zeros. Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country (e.g. inland-water identifiers, auxiliary craft, base stations) or for MMSIs shorter than 9 digits.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket. For static reports this is derived directly from the AIS Type-5/24 ShipType field via the standard ITU-R M.1371 vocabulary (e.g. 'cargo', 'tanker', 'passenger', 'fishing', 'tug', 'pleasure-craft'). For position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI; if no static report has been observed for the MMSI yet, the value is 'unknown'.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (Latitude, Longitude) using the standard base32 geohash alphabet. Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position (Type 5/24/21 base reports) this is filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000' if no position has been seen.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

user_id.description: Source AIS UserID for the AtoN station (9-digit MMSI).

type.description: AtoN type code (0..31) per ITU-R M.1371.

latitude.description: Reported latitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Reported longitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

off_position.description: True if the AtoN is reported off its assigned position.

virtual_atoN.description: True if this is a virtual AtoN broadcast by a base station.

description: AISStream publishes vessel position, voyage, safety, and static AIS messages from AISStream public AIS firehose for AIS-equipped vessels received by the AISStream network. These events help consumers monitor mobility operations, passenger information, and traffic conditions without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for AISStream, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
